title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Ahmedabad

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Ahmedabad
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad:
IIM Ahmedabad is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad!
